ses.configurationset.reputationoptions.C: Contains information about the reputation settings for a configuration set.

ses.configurationset.reputationoptions.R.Description: Describes whether or not Amazon SES publishes reputation metrics for the configuration set, such as bounce and complaint rates, to Amazon CloudWatch.  If the value is `true`, reputation metrics are published. If the value is `false`, reputation metrics are not published. The default value is `false`.
